data.name: Auth.RegistrationClosedMessage
data.value: Registration is currently closed. Please contact the administrator.

data.name: Auth.SignInToContinue
data.value: Sign in to continue to Melodee

data.name: Auth.UnableToLogin
data.value: Melodee is unable to log you in. perhaps you are banned?

data.name: Auth.InvalidGoogleCredentials
data.value: Invalid Google credentials. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.GoogleSessionExpired
data.value: Your Google session has expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: Auth.GoogleAccountNotLinked
data.value: This Google account is not linked to any Melodee account. Please sign in with your password and link your Google account from your profile.

data.name: Auth.SignupDisabled
data.value: New account registration is currently disabled. Please contact an administrator.

data.name: Auth.ForbiddenTenant
data.value: Your Google account domain is not allowed. Please use a different account.

data.name: Auth.AccountDisabled
data.value: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support.

data.name: Auth.GoogleSignInError
data.value: An error occurred during Google Sign-In. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.SignInErrorTryAgain
data.value: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.FillOutForm
data.value: Fill out this form and click Register to create a new user account.

data.name: Auth.AccessCodeRequired
data.value: Registering a new account requires an access code to be entered. Whoever invited you can provide this code to you.

data.name: Auth.AccessCodeWarning
data.value: If you do not have the code, kindly go away 👉.

data.name: Auth.UnableToCreateAccount
data.value: Melodee is unable to create a new user account for you.

data.name: Auth.RegistrationSuccess
data.value: Registered new account, you should get an email, be sure and click the validate button.

data.name: Messages.ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: Messages.UnsavedChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to continue?

data.name: Dashboard.NoPlayHistoryYet
data.value: No play history yet. Start listening to see your top songs!

data.name: About.Description
data.value: Melodee is a modern music server system that provides a comprehensive solution for managing and streaming your music collection.

data.name: Data.MergeConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to merge the selected items?

data.name: Data.DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected items?

data.name: Data.SelectItemsToMerge
data.value: Select at least 2 items to merge

data.name: Data.ArtistLockedMessage
data.value: Artist is locked. Locked artists cannot be deleted.

data.name: Data.SongLockedMessage
data.value: Song is locked. Locked songs cannot be deleted.

data.name: Data.SongMergingInfo
data.value: Song merging allows combining multiple song entries. This feature requires careful selection of songs to merge.

data.name: Data.PlaylistLockedMessage
data.value: Playlist is locked. Locked playlists cannot be deleted.

data.name: Profile.LanguageHelp
data.value: Select your preferred language. Leave empty to use English.

data.name: Profile.ThemeHelp
data.value: Select your preferred UI theme. Changes are saved and applied immediately.

data.name: Profile.UnlinkConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to unlink your Google account? You will no longer be able to sign in with Google.

data.name: Profile.InvalidTimeZoneDetail
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid IANA timezone id.

data.name: Profile.ProfileUpdatedDetail
data.value: Your profile has been successfully updated.

data.name: Profile.LinkingError
data.value: An error occurred while linking. Please try again.

data.name: Profile.UnlinkingError
data.value: An error occurred while unlinking. Please try again.

data.name: RequestDetail.ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this request?

data.name: RequestEdit.CanOnlyEditOwn
data.value: You can only edit your own requests

data.name: Validation.EmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: Validation.PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters

data.name: Message.DragAndDropImages
data.value: Drag and drop or paste images here

data.name: Message.NoImagesFound
data.value: No images found for this album.

data.name: ArtistDetail.DeleteArtistWarning
data.value: Delete the artist, all artist albums, and all album files. BEWARE!

data.name: ArtistDetail.RescanArtist
data.value: Rebuild metadata and rescan artists albums.

data.name: AlbumDetail.DeleteAlbum
data.value: Delete the album and all album files. BEWARE!

data.name: AlbumDetail.RescanAlbum
data.value: Rebuild metadata and rescan album folder.

data.name: AlbumDetail.NotFeaturedOnCharts
data.value: This album is not featured on any charts.

data.name: AlbumDetail.UploadFailedInvalidPath
data.value: Filename contains invalid characters or path components

data.name: Libraries.LockedLibraryMessage
data.value: Library is locked. Locked libraries cannot be deleted.

data.name: LibraryDetail.CleanLibrary
data.value: Clean library, removing any empty folders.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ProcessLibrary
data.value: Process media files into Melodee media json file.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ScanLibrary
data.value: Scan for Melodee media json files and update database data.

data.name: LibraryDetail.UpdateAggregates
data.value: Update all aggregate counts for library, including; artists, contributors and albums in library.

data.name: LibraryDetail.PurgeWarning
data.value: Purging a library deletes all artists, albums and songs.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ScanWarning
data.value: Scanning a library updates database information from Melodee data files.

data.name: LibraryDetail.BackgroundJobNotice
data.value: This action starts a background job.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ProcessWarning
data.value: Processing a library creates Melodee data files with media found. This could overwrite Melodee data files, images and songs.

data.name: LibraryDetail.CleanTooltip
data.value: Clean library, removing any empty folders.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ProcessTooltip
data.value: Process media files into Melodee media json file.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ScanTooltip
data.value: Scan for Melodee media json files and update database data.

data.name: LibraryDetail.UpdateAggregatesTooltip
data.value: Update all aggregate counts for library, including; artists, contributors and albums in library.

data.name: LibraryDetail.PurgeMessage
data.value:
Purging a library deletes all artists, albums and songs.

There is no undo

data.name: LibraryDetail.ScanMessage
data.value:
Scanning a library updates database information from Melodee data files.

This action starts a background job.

There is no undo

data.name: LibraryDetail.ProcessMessage
data.value:
Processing a library creates Melodee data files with media found. This could overwrite Melodee data files, images and songs.

This action starts a background job.

⚠️ There is no undo

data.name: PlaylistDetail.ImageFeatureDescription
data.value: This feature allows setting custom images for playlists.

data.name: PlaylistDetail.LockFeatureNotImplemented
data.value: Playlist lock/unlock functionality is not yet fully implemented.

data.name: RequestDetail.DeleteRequestConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this request?

data.name: RequestEdit.OnlyEditOwnRequests
data.value: You can only edit your own requests

data.name: ArtistEdit.ExternalSearchDescription
data.value: External search integration for artist metadata retrieval.

data.name: ArtistEdit.ExternalSearchDetails
data.value: This feature allows searching external providers (iTunes, Last.fm, Spotify) for artist information.

data.name: AlbumEdit.ExternalSearchDescription
data.value: External search integration for album metadata retrieval.

data.name: AlbumEdit.ExternalSearchDetails
data.value: This feature allows searching external providers for album information.

data.name: Charts.DeleteChartConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'?

data.name: Charts.DeleteChartsConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} selected chart(s)?

data.name: ChartsRankedReport.Description
data.value: Albums ranked by their aggregate position across multiple charts

data.name: ChartsMissingReport.Description
data.value: Albums that appear on charts but are not found in the database

data.name: AdminJobs.JobsDisabled
data.value: Jobs are disabled in the appsettings.json file. Set the setting "{0}" to "false" (or remove entirely) to enable.

data.name: AdminJobs.NoJobsFound
data.value: No jobs found. Check your configuration and enable the Cron Expressions for Jobs in Settings.

data.name: AdminJobs.JobsDisabledMessage
data.value: Jobs are disabled in the appsettings.json file. Set the setting

data.name: AdminSettings.AllKeysExist
data.value: All settings from SettingRegistry already have records in the database.

data.name: ChartEditor.CSVFormatExample
data.value: 1,The Beatles,Abbey Road,1969\n2,Pink Floyd,The Dark Side of the Moon,1973...

data.name: ChartEditor.CSVFormatDescription
data.value: Format: Rank,Artist,Album,Year (optional) — one entry per line

data.name: ChartEditor.UploadImageDescription
data.value: Upload an image for this chart. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP (max 10MB)

data.name: ChartEditor.ImageSelectedWillUpload
data.value: Image selected - will be uploaded when chart is created

data.name: ChartEditor.PasteCSVData
data.value: Paste CSV data below. Format: Rank,ArtistName,AlbumTitle,Year (optional)

data.name: ChartEditor.LinkingComplete
data.value: Linking complete: {0} linked, {1} ambiguous, {2} unlinked, {3} skipped

data.name: ChartEditor.OverwriteManualLinks
data.value: Do you want to overwrite manually resolved links?

data.name: ChartEditor.FixCSVErrors
data.value: Please fix CSV errors before creating

data.name: ChartEditor.InvalidImageType
data.value: Invalid image type. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP.

data.name: ChartEditor.ImageSizeTooLarge
data.value: Image file size must be less than 10MB.

data.name: ChartEditor.ChartCreatedItemsFailed
data.value: Chart created but items failed to save

data.name: ChartEditor.ChartCreatedImageFailed
data.value: Chart created but image upload failed

data.name: ChartEditor.ConfirmDeleteImage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the chart image?

data.name: ChartImportDialog.PasteJSON
data.value: Paste JSON here or upload a file...

data.name: ChartImportDialog.ItemsRequired
data.value: 'items' array is required and must contain at least one item.

data.name: ChartItemResolveDialog.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by artist or album name...

data.name: MediaLibrary.DeleteSelectedAlbums
data.value: Delete selected media albums, including album files. BEWARE!

data.name: MediaLibrary.DeleteAllNotOk
data.value: Delete all not Ok status albums in library. BEWARE!

data.name: MediaLibrary.DeletingNotOkWarning
data.value: Deleting all not Ok albums can potentially delete many albums

data.name: MediaLibrary.FindMissingImagesDescription
data.value: This will search for images for all albums that currently have no images. This may take a while.

data.name: MediaLibrary.DryRunPrompt
data.value: Do you want to perform a dry-run first to see what would change?

data.name: MediaLibrary.SelectLibraryFor
data.value: Select the destination library for OK albums:

data.name: MediaAlbumDetail.AddArtistTooltip
data.value: Add a new artist to metadata database using this artists details.

data.name: MediaAlbumDetail.IdentifyAlbum
data.value: Identify the album from search providers.

data.name: MediaAlbumDetail.NoImagesAdded
data.value: No images were added to the album. Likely the image you selected was invalid.

data.name: Notification.ChartCreatedItemsFailed
data.value: Chart created but items failed to save

data.name: Notification.ChartCreatedImageFailed
data.value: Chart created but image upload failed

data.name: Notification.FindMissingImagesResult
data.value: Found and set images for {0} out of {1} albums.

data.name: Notification.ScanningLibraryWarning
data.value: Scanning a library updates the library with media found. This could overwrite artists, albums and songs.

data.name: Charts.ConfirmDeleteChart
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'?

data.name: Charts.ConfirmDeleteCharts
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} selected chart(s)?

data.name: ChartImportDialog.Error.ItemsRequired
data.value: 'items' array is required and must contain at least one item.

data.name: ChartImportDialog.Error.RankPositive
data.value: Item {0}: 'rank' must be a positive integer.

data.name: ChartImportDialog.ChartCreatedItemsFailed
data.value: Chart created but items failed to parse

data.name: ChartImportDialog.ImageDownloadErrorDetail
data.value: Could not download image from URL

data.name: UploadAlbum.Instructions
data.value: Select one or more ZIP files containing album files (audio files, images, etc.). Each file will be extracted to a new folder in the Inbound library.

data.name: UploadAlbum.AuthError
data.value: Authentication error. Please log in again.

data.name: UploadAlbum.MenuTooltip
data.value: Upload a ZIP file containing an album to this library.

data.name: UploadAlbum.UploadCompleteDetail
data.value: Album files have been uploaded and extracted successfully.

data.name: UploadAlbum.InvalidZip
data.value: The uploaded file is not a valid ZIP archive.

data.name: Auth.ForgotPasswordSubtitle
data.value: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

data.name: Auth.CheckEmailForResetLink
data.value: If an account with that email exists, you will receive a password reset link shortly.

data.name: Auth.TooManyAttempts
data.value: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

data.name: Auth.EmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: Auth.TokenExpiredMessage
data.value: This password reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.

data.name: Auth.ForgotPasswordDisabled
data.value: Password reset via email is currently disabled

data.name: Auth.ContactAdminToResetPassword
data.value: Please contact your system administrator to reset your password.

data.name: Auth.PasswordResetUnavailable
data.value: Password reset is currently unavailable. Please contact your system administrator.

data.name: Auth.PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters

data.name: Auth.ResetPasswordError
data.value: An error occurred while resetting your password

data.name: ArtistDetail.ValidateAlbums
data.value: Validate all albums for this artist

data.name: AdminDoctor.Description
data.value: Diagnose installation, configuration, and environment issues

data.name: AdminDoctor.LibraryPathsMissing
data.value: One or more library paths are missing

data.name: AdminDoctor.LibraryPathsNotWritable
data.value: Some library paths are not writable

data.name: AdminDoctor.LibraryPathsMissingAndNotWritable
data.value: Some library paths are missing or not writable

data.name: AdminDoctor.AllLibraryPathsOk
data.value: All library paths exist and are writable

data.name: AdminDoctor.MusicBrainzDatabaseEmpty
data.value: MusicBrainz database is empty and needs to be populated

data.name: AdminDoctor.DiskSpaceWarning
data.value: Warning: Disk space is running low

data.name: AdminDoctor.SearchEngineApiKeysMissing
data.value: Some enabled search engines are missing API keys

data.name: AdminDoctor.SearchEngineApiKeysOk
data.value: All enabled search engines have API keys configured

data.name: AdminDoctor.LibraryPathOverlapDetected
data.value: Library path overlap detected - paths may conflict

data.name: Dashboard.IssuesDetected
data.value: Issues detected. Review the Doctor page for details.

data.name: AdminDoctor.MusicBrainzJobDescription
data.value: Downloads and updates the local MusicBrainz database for artist and album metadata lookups.

data.name: Search.NoResultsDescription
data.value: We couldn't find any artists, albums, or songs matching "{0}". Try a different search term or request the music you're looking for.

data.name: Dashboard.NoArtistsFound
data.value: No artists found. Start by scanning your library.

data.name: Dashboard.NoAlbumsFound
data.value: No albums found. Start by scanning your library.

data.name: Stats.NoDataHint
data.value: Upload or scan music to get started

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.PasteJSON
data.value: Paste or upload dynamic playlist JSON

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.SQLNotes
data.value: The songSelectionWhere and songSelectionOrder fields use PostgreSQL SQL syntax. Use table alias 's' for songs table.

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.Error.IdRequired
data.value: Playlist ID is required and must be a valid GUID

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.FileExistsDetail
data.value: A dynamic playlist with the same ID already exists: {0}

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.ImportSuccessDetail
data.value: Dynamic playlist '{0}' has been imported as {1}

data.name: SettingDetail.SetViaEnvironmentVariable
data.value: This setting is currently overridden by an environment variable

data.name: ArtistLookup.SearchError
data.value: An error occurred while searching. Please try again.

data.name: ArtistLookup.SomeProvidersFailed
data.value: Some search providers failed. Results may be incomplete.

data.name: ArtistLookup.AmghelpText
data.value: Enter an AMG Artist ID (digits only) to look up the artist

data.name: ArtistLookup.SelectToMerge
data.value: Select one or more results to merge their provider IDs

data.name: Podcast.FeatureDisabled
data.value: Podcast feature is currently disabled. Please contact your administrator to enable it.

data.name: Podcast.DeleteChannelConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this podcast channel? All downloaded episodes will be removed.

data.name: Podcast.DeleteEpisodeConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this episode?

data.name: Podcast.AutoDownloadDescription
data.value: When enabled, new episodes will be automatically downloaded when the channel is refreshed

data.name: Podcast.RefreshIntervalDescription
data.value: How often to check for new episodes (0 = use global schedule)

data.name: Podcast.StorageLimitsDescription
data.value: Limit the number of downloaded episodes and total storage used

data.name: Podcast.OpmlExportDescription
data.value: Export all your podcast subscriptions to an OPML file

data.name: Podcast.OpmlImportDescription
data.value: Import podcast subscriptions from an OPML file or paste OPML content

data.name: Podcast.DiscoverDescription
data.value: Search the iTunes directory to find and subscribe to new podcasts

data.name: Podcast.SearchEpisodesDescription
data.value: Search across all episodes in your subscribed podcasts

data.name: Podcast.SearchEpisodesHint
data.value: Enter at least 3 characters to search
